text: Two people ride elephants into a pool of water for a watching crowd.
A woman holding two pieces of rolling luggage.
Two antelope standing in snow in front of a thicket of tall grass.
A person using cross country skis at a park.
A black and white defensively looking up by its bowl.
Three giraffes in a fence, one of them bending down.
A Gold Framed Clock tower about to strike the time 7:00.
A group of people meeting at the public farmers market.
Several bicycles has little grills on the front to keep the pizza warm.
A train coming down the tracks through a town.
